name: Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking
tagline: Reasoning-tuned variant of the original 16B/A3B vision-language model.
metaDescription: Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2025-04 — part of the Kimi-VL line. Reasoning-tuned variant of the original 16B/A3B vision-language model.
overview: Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi-VL line. Released 2025-04. Open-weight 16B-parameter MoE (3B active) vision-language model line for multimodal reasoning and long-context understanding.
What's notable in this version: Reasoning-tuned variant of the original 16B/A3B vision-language model.
